case_title: CHOO, DAVID vs. PETTIES, GAYNOR et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST WRITTEN RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOO, DAVID
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT PETTIES, GAYNOR
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOO, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT PETTIES, GAYNOR DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $80.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOO, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT PETTIES, GAYNOR
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PETTIES, GAYNOR
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE D.R.V. IS $14.66 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOO, DAVID

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOO, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETTIES, GAYNOR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 650 ELLIS STREET, #19, LEASE FORFEITED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOO, DAVID SERVED MAY-03-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PETTIES, GAYNOR
